name: Police Evolution Idle
description: The criminals are all around the city and somebody should stop these criminals and make the city more peaceful in the Police Evolution Idle game. It is time to chase after the criminals and find the wrong parking cars, and traffic control points. By you punish the criminals, you will be able to unlock new gaming features like new suspect types, and new traffic control types. Try to unlock the latest place and complete the game as quickly as possible.
instructions: Move 34 W A S D 34 or 34 ARROW KEYS 34 or 34 MOUSE 34 and 34 LEFT-CLICK 34
tags: 3D, 3D Games, Action, Adventure, Boy, Police, Simulation, Unity3D, WebGL
